Package in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.disb.model

Class MedicineDetail

  • java.lang.Object
    • in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.disb.model.MedicineDetail
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable
    public class MedicineDetail
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.io.Serializable
    Author:
    root MedicineDetail contains detail information about Real Medicinal Product
